title: avenastrum schellianum
intro: Avenastrum schellianum, also known as Schell's avenastrum or Schell's false hellebore, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate various health issues, including pain, fever, and respiratory problems. The medicinal properties of Avenastrum schellianum have been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. Avenastrum schellianum is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal use, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
